name: Primo Personal Loans
description_short: Norfolk, VA's Primo Personal Loans storefront at 415 N Military Hwy offers fast payday and title loans to residents with flexible terms.
description_long:
Primo Personal Loans operates a standalone storefront at 415 N Military Hwy in Norfolk, VA. Open Monday through Friday from 7am to 8pm and Saturday and Sunday from 9am to 6pm, this Norfolk location serves residents of the greater Hampton Roads area with quick, accessible financial services. The convenient hours make it easy for Norfolk workers to stop by before or after their shifts.

This Norfolk location specializes in payday loans and title loans, offering flexible terms and fast approval processes. Call +1 757-414-9724 to speak with a loan specialist about your specific needs, ask about application requirements, or to get pre-approval information before visiting.

If you're a Norfolk resident facing an unexpected expense or cash shortage, Primo Personal Loans can help bridge the gap. Bring a valid ID, proof of income, and bank account information to your appointment. Primo Personal Loans has helped countless Norfolk residents access emergency funds when they need it most.
pros: Loan amounts as low as $100, accessible to borrowers needing small emergency cash
Online application process with potential same-day or next-day funding
Claims online applications do not impact FICO credit scores
100% SSL and TSL encryption for online security
Transparent about limitations—explicitly states loans are for short-term needs only
Recommends credit counseling for borrowers in financial hardship
Provides accessibility features and customer support via phone (803) 674-5822
cons: The Memphis location page (reviewed URL) returns a 404 error, indicating the company may not serve that area or the location is inactive
Loan verification process can delay fund release by up to two business days despite claims of fast funding
May use non-traditional consumer reporting agencies, which could affect borrower profiles even if FICO scores aren't directly impacted
Interest rates, fees, and loan availability vary significantly by state with no transparency on actual APR or cost examples provided
Company explicitly discourages use for long-term financial needs, limiting applicability for many borrowers
best_for: Consumers in states where Primo operates who need $100–$1,000 in emergency cash quickly
Borrowers seeking a small loan without undergoing a hard credit inquiry that affects FICO scores
People who prefer online applications and want to avoid in-person loan processes
diagnosis: Primo Personal Loans is best suited for borrowers in active service states who need quick access to small emergency loans ($100–$5,000) without a hard credit pull. The primary caveat is the lack of location transparency (the reviewed Memphis URL is inactive) and the absence of publicly disclosed APR or fee information, making it essential to contact them directly for actual terms before applying.
services: Same-day or next-day funding (subject to verification)
Accessibility accommodations for assistive technology users
meta_description: Primo Personal Loans at 415 N Military Hwy, Norfolk, VA. Fast payday and title loans with flexible terms.
